title: Update EdhocResponder callsites and export_context for consistent edhoc_kdf usage
description: Update Responder methods in rust/lichen-oscore/src/edhoc.rs (process_message_1, process_message_3, export_oscore) to use new edhoc_kdf(prk, th, label, context, len). Fix mac_2, mac_3, k_3, iv_3, exporter calls. Align with Initiator changes. Update export_context fn.
close_reason: Updated EdhocResponder process_message_1 (added missing signature_2 + credential_r logic using build_signature_structure and mac_2), process_message_3 callsites, cleaned dead/duplicate code blocks, updated export_context and edhoc_kdf signature+all calls to consistent new form (prk, th, label_str, context, len) matching Python/C impl and Initiator. Removed 74 lines of broken code. Tests would be next but cargo unavailable in env.
